sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String, numeric_value Float64);
SELECT left(text, (SELECT MAX(numeric_value) FROM test_strings WHERE numeric_value IS NOT NULL)) AS left_part, id FROM test_strings WHERE id GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE text != '');
SELECT id, left(text, -1 * COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY numeric_value)) AS truncated FROM test_strings GROUP BY id, text, numeric_value HAVING text != '' AND numeric_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, left(text, (SELECT MAX(numeric_value) FROM test_strings WHERE numeric_value > 0)) AS adjusted_text FROM test_strings WHERE 'Fuzz' GLOBAL IN (SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE text != '');
SELECT DISTINCT left(text, 3) AS sub_text FROM (SELECT text, id FROM test_strings WHERE numeric_value IS NOT NULL OR text IS NULL) AS filtered GROUP BY sub_text HAVING COUNT(sub_text) > 1;

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_indices ENGINE = Memory AS SELECT id, left(text, 2) AS short_text FROM test_strings; SELECT * FROM temp_indices WHERE short_text GLOBAL IN (SELECT left(text, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE text != '');
